script_for_bot: Café? Great for brainstorming—keep tasks short and loud-friendly. Library? Deep focus zone—block 20 minutes for reading, then stretch. Home? Try music or noise app to anchor focus, and keep phone behind you.
rationale: Environmental adaptation helps ADHD learners use external structure to sustain attention.
source: Open University 'Studying with ADHD'; Edutopia 'Designing Study Spaces for Focus'
